description: Bot CHANGES_REQUESTED review plus a human review thread. The bot CR review is dismissed in the resolve command (with --dismiss-review-ids); the human thread reply is in the same command. No resolve-only split needed because there are no bot-thread resolve or minimize mutations.

changesRequestedReviews.author: claude
changesRequestedReviews.body:
## Blockers

1. **Unchecked error.** `src/handler.mts:55` ignores the return value of `writeFile`. Add error handling.

reviewThreads.author: alice
reviewThreads.body: Can you also add a retry here?

comments.author: alice
comments.body: Can you also add a retry here?
